node.text: James has visited Italy, Turkey, and Mexico besides his permanent residence and found Italy to be very beautiful with delicious food.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "visit Italy travel") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James recommends prosciutto pizza to John, highlighting its greatness.
James also likes cheese pizza and prosciutto on his pizza.
James expressed an interest in traveling together with John to a new country next year and plans to start looking for options.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "visit Italy travel") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James's favorite type of pizza is pepperoni for its spicy salami and cheese combination.
James's happiness comes from his pets, computer games, travel, and pizza.
